title: Divas World Ceramic Festive Boot Snowman Gingerbread Shaped Mug – Hand-Painted 3D Design – Decorative Hot Drink Cup for Home Kitchen (Snowman (11.5cmx8cm))
features: Each mug is made from high-grade ceramic material, offering strength, smooth texture, and resistance to stains and heat. The glossy glaze prevents fading and ensures long-lasting shine even with frequent use.
Carefully hand-painted by artisans, these mugs feature vibrant color combinations and fine details that bring out their distinctive charm, adding joy to every drink.
Includes a boot-shaped mug, a snowman mug with striped handle, and a smiling gingerbread mug with candy-cane handle — each beautifully sculpted and full of personality.
Ranging between 11.5 cm to 12.5 cm in height, these mugs hold a generous amount of liquid, ideal for coffee, tea, or hot chocolate.
Designed with ergonomically curved handles for secure and comfortable holding, making your drinking experience safe and pleasant.
Their artistic design makes them ideal for display on kitchen shelves, counters, or office desks, adding a cheerful touch to any space.
The ceramic glaze finish ensures easy cleaning and durability. Safe for daily use; gently hand wash to preserve detailing and color vibrancy.
These artistic mugs make a thoughtful and creative present for family, friends, or coworkers, suitable for birthdays, celebrations, or special occasions.
description: Celebrate the season with this charming collection of hand-painted festive mugs, designed to add warmth and cheer to every sip. Each mug features a unique 3D sculpted shape inspired by classic holiday characters — a jolly snowman wrapped in a red scarf, a smiling gingerbread figure with a candy-stripe handle, and a bright red boot adorned with holly leaves. Crafted from durable ceramic, these mugs are both decorative and practical. The high-gloss finish enhances the vivid colours, while the sturdy handle provides a comfortable grip for hot drinks such as tea, coffee, or hot chocolate. Each design captures the joyful spirit of the season, making them ideal for serving your favourite beverages or using as decorative pieces on a kitchen shelf or festive table. These mugs are also perfect for gifting — whether shared with loved ones, used for seasonal gatherings, or filled with sweets or cocoa sachets as a thoughtful treat. Their novelty shapes make them appealing for all ages, bringing a playful touch to the holiday season and beyond. Key Features: Material: High-quality ceramic Finish: Glossy hand-painted design Capacity: Approx. standard mug size (ideal for hot drinks) Shape options: Red Boot, Gingerbread Character, or Snowman Use: Suitable for hot or cold beverages Cleaning: Hand wash recommended to preserve colour and detail Add festive joy to your mornings, brighten your coffee breaks, or use them as part of your seasonal décor. Each mug showcases fine detailing, vibrant colour, and a cheerful personality that instantly makes any moment feel more special. Whether displayed or used daily, these delightful mugs blend function, artistry, and seasonal charm in one.
